issues.issue: Work description references 'CMM 73-11-01 Rev. 12' but no CMM document was provided for verification — revision number cannot be independently confirmed

CRITICAL: Part number 881700-1098 in 8010-4 does not match the part number 881700-1089 confirmed by photo evidence (data plate) and audio transcript. Digits appear transposed (1098 vs 1089). Must be corrected before submission.
Total time since new (4,250 hours / 2,100 cycles) not directly confirmed by any evidence source — appears to be AI-inferred. Should be verified against maintenance records.

crossDocumentConsistency.note: Part number inconsistency: 8130-3 and Form 337 correctly show 881700-1089, but 8010-4 shows 881700-1098. This is likely a transcription error in the 8010-4 form generation.
